0.response: {"Q0":"I chose lotteries based on which ones had the higher chance of winning, for the most part.  I tried to pick one quickly because I knew that my reaction time was not amazing for that task.  Once I realized the planets have the same sequence every time, I entered it more quickly."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I chose based on which would be safest, more than anything.  But if there was something with a high payout and decent percent of winning compared to another choice, I might do that too. "}

1.response: {"Q0":"No, but I may have chosen some options that were too safe or too risky for my usual tastes as the game went on longer.  "}

5.response: {"Q0":"I only dug once by accident. I was thinking about the lottery choice and multi tasking, and by that I mean, the game requires multi tasking.  "}

8.response: {"Q0":"I focused more on selecting galaxies because I knew I was slow at that, and the planet visiting aspect required less focus."}
